inUse.title: Skills in use
inUse.subtitle: Browse, enable, and remove skills from every harness that skill-manager controls.
inUse.errorDescription: Try refreshing the local data, or select another skill from the sidebar.
inUse.emptyDescription: Adopt a local skill from the review queue or install one from the marketplace.
inUse.emptyBody: Review local skill folders or install something from the marketplace to start controlling harness coverage here.
inUse.errorLoading: Unable to load skills in use.

needsReview.title: Skills to review
needsReview.subtitle: {{count}} skill needs a review decision.
needsReview.subtitleEmpty: No local skill folders need review across your harnesses.
needsReview.emptyDescription: No unmanaged local skills or config differences were detected.
needsReview.emptyBodyInUse: Your local harness folders are either already in use through Skill Manager or currently empty. Install from the marketplace to add new skills.
needsReview.errorLoading: Unable to load skills to review.

workspace.deleteDescription: This action cannot be undone. The selected skills will be permanently removed.
workspace.deleteHarnessDescription: This removes the Skill Manager copy and its symlinks from every harness.
workspace.deleteHarnessNote: The source on disk outside the Skill Manager store is not touched.

board.title: Skills harness matrix
board.selectiveDescription: Enabled on some, off on others
board.name: Name
board.noDisabledMessage: No inactive skills — every skill in use is running somewhere.
board.noSelectiveMessage: No skills are partially enabled. Open a card to pick specific harnesses.
board.noEnabledMessage: No skills are universally enabled yet.

needsReviewCard.addToManager: Add this skill to Skill Manager
needsReviewCard.cannotAdopt: This skill cannot be adopted automatically

detail.chooseConfig: Choose which config to treat as the source of truth.
detail.noSkillMd: No SKILL.md document is available for this entry.
detail.canonicalDescription: Skill Manager Store is the canonical, physical copy of this skill. Individual harness locations are linked below, but the store is where the copies reside.
detail.canonicalDescriptionShort: Skill Manager Store is the canonical physical package. Tool locations are symlinks to it when enabled.
detail.errorDescription: Try selecting the skill again from the sidebar or refreshing the page.
detail.errorDescriptionAlt: Try selecting the skill again, or return to the list and reopen it.
detail.removeBlockedHint: Enable at least one harness before removing this skill from Skill Manager.
detail.removeDescription: Removes this skill from the Skill Manager store and restores local copies only for the harnesses that are currently enabled.

configChoice.title: Choose config to adopt
configChoice.descriptionChoose: Choose which harness configuration to use as the source of truth.
configChoice.descriptionApply: Apply a consistent configuration across all harnesses.

confirmDialog.removeDescription: This removes {{skillName}} from the Skill Manager store and restores local copies only for the harnesses that are currently enabled.
confirmDialog.deleteDescriptionWithName: This will remove {{skillName}} from the shared store and delete its links from all harnesses.

emptyState.noResults: No skills match the current filters.
emptyState.adjustSearch: Adjust the search or clear the filter to see more results.
emptyState.adjustSearchAlt: Adjust the search or filter controls to bring skills back into view.

errors.actionFailed: Unable to complete the requested action.
errors.bulkActionFailed: Unable to complete the bulk action.
errors.multiEnableFailed: Unable to enable every harness for {{count}} skills: {{names}}.
errors.multiDisableFailed: Unable to disable every harness for {{count}} skills: {{names}}.
